BlastOutput.BlastOutput_reference: Stephen F. Altschul, Thomas L. Madden, Alejandro A. Schäffer, Jinghui Zhang, Zheng Zhang, Webb Miller, and David J. Lipman (1997), "Gapped BLAST and PSI-BLAST: a new generation of protein database search programs", Nucleic Acids Res. 25:3389-3402.

Hsp.Hsp_midline: P+++P I+F+T GAT +S++ F+R V+ LT G + + +P LP R GLP ++RF+ V+LSN VTLA+D +N +VGY+AG++A FF P+N+ +AE + LFTDV+ + T F G LE++AG E++ LG PLEEAI LY Y+TG +
P+++P I+F+T GAT +S++ F+R V+ LT G + + +P LP R GLP ++RF+ V+LSN VTLA+D +N +VGY+AG++A FF P+N+ +AE + LFTDV+ + T F G LE++AG E++ LG PLEEAI LY Y+TG +
P+++P I+F+T GAT +S++ F+R V+ LT G + + +P LP R GLP ++RF+ V+LSN VTLA+D +N +VGY+AG++A FF P+N+ +AE + LFTDV+ + T F G LE++AG ED+ LG PLEEAI LY Y+TG +
+D+ P+++P I+F+T GAT +S++ F+R V+ LT G + + +P LP R GLP ++RF+ V+LSN VTLA+D +N +VGY+AG++A FF P+N+ +AE + LFTDV+ + T F G LE++AG E++ LG PLEEAI LY Y+TG +
